name: Nessa - Common Sense Manipulation
description:
After coming across Nessa on the beach, you used your Hypno to condition Nessa into seeing ANYTHING you suggest as normal.

(I don't know anything about pokemans or whatever but why Game Freak gotta make their characters so hot!?)
